description: Alright, gamers, here’s the play: 2,121 ZX Spectrum loading screens, minted as Ordinals. Each one’s a unique throwback to 8-bit glory. 🎮 But here’s the kicker—we’re minting one OG Spectrum game on-chain and dropping it to every Ordinal holder. Own the history, play the legend. Mint it. Flex it. Game on. 👾🔥
name: GameMinerZX🌈
